title: Add comment explaining inventory::submit! in backends
description: Each backend file (secretx-env, secretx-file, secretx-aws-sm, etc.) contains an inventory::submit! block with no explanatory comment. A new contributor unfamiliar with the inventory crate's compile-time linker-section registration would not understand why this block is needed or what it does. Add a brief comment above each inventory::submit! block explaining: (1) that inventory is used for compile-time backend registration, (2) that the linker-section is collected by the umbrella crate, (3) that this registration enables from_uri dispatch. Pattern comment should be added to at least one backend as a template.
